sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20087" key="blenno/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλεννός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n20087.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drivelling</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:119" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
